titles.title: 時光代理人 英都篇

data.title: Shiguang Dailiren: Yingdu Pian
data.title_japanese: 時光代理人 英都篇
data.synopsis:
Lu Guang loses everything when a mysterious man bursts into the photo studio that he is renting with his close friend Cheng Xiaoshi. The man, who comes to punish the members at the studio for playing with time, murders both Qiao Ling and Cheng Xiaoshi in cold blood. However, Lu Guang inherits his friend's power to go back in time and decides to save everyone from their grim fate.

Now in the past, Lu Guang travels to Bridon to help Cheng Xiaoshi investigate his father's whereabouts; however, he discovers an uncanny series of small disparities that cause the situation to spiral into complete uncertainty. Suddenly unable to rely on his ability to predict the future, Lu Guang must invent a new strategy to foil the plans of the man who took everything from him.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Aoshi Jiuchong Tian
data.synopsis:
Chu Yang, wielding the Nine Tribulations Sword, the most powerful divine artifact on the Nine Heavens Continent, was slaughtered. After being driven to the brink of death by a mob, a sword pierced his heart, inadvertently awakening the Nine Tribulations Sword and reborn as a boy, experiencing life anew. In this life, he will forge a different path from his past, protecting his lover and brothers. Chu Yang once again embarks on a journey to find the Nine Tribulations Sword. Fate is about to be rewritten; a passionate young man battles for power and cunning in the martial world, seeking revenge and overturning the Nine Heavens.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Fei Ling Tian Xia's (风凌天下) web novel of the same title.

titles.title: Zhengjing Shao Zhu de Xingfu Shenghuo

data.title: Zhengjing Shao Zhu de Xingfu Shenghuo
data.synopsis:
In the wild world, human beings are small, but not humble. Whether it is Shennong and his people in the human domain, or the various clans in Beiye, they are working hard and developing vigorously in their own way. Although he will be bewitched and suppressed by the Star God, he will also launch a tenacious resistance to the Star God in order to protect his tribe, his relatives and bloodline. 

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Yanguizhengzhuan's (言归正传) web novel, Zhege Ren Xian Taiguo Zhengjing (这个人仙太过正经).

data.title: Qi Hou Bilu
data.synopsis:
Two thousand years ago, a descendant of the Yinyang Family felt sad for the burning of books and burying of scholars at the order of Qin Shihuang (the first emperor of the Qin Dynasty) and the burning of Epang Palace. In order not to let the scholars die in vain, he began to turn their spirits into brushes for inheritance by future generations. Back to the present day, Luo Zhongxia, an ordinary college student, accidentally gets a brush with Li Bai's spirit, and gains its superpower. But before long, various forces are in a mad scramble for the power, putting Luo Zhongxia in danger in many occasions. To avoid more dangers, Luo Zhongxia tries to find the way to return the brush, but fails every time. On the contrary, Luo Zhongxia becomes inextricably bound up with seven brush spirits.

(Source: Bilibilil)
data.background: Adaptation of Ma Boyong's (马伯庸) web novel of the same title.

data.title: Tadaima, Okaeri
data.synopsis:
Hoping for a fresh start, househusband Masaki Fujiyoshi, his spouse Hiromu, and their toddler son, Hikari, move to a new neighborhood. The couple's union was frowned upon by many due to Masaki's status as an omega—a secondary gender that allows an individual to give birth. Even for an alpha—seen as the superior secondary gender—such as Hiromu, discrimination seems to be commonplace and a hindrance to a life of domestic bliss.

Fortunately, the new family is not alone. Little Hikari becomes attached to Yuuki Hirai, the Fujiyoshis' lonely college student neighbor. Despite his initial reluctance, Yuuki ends up befriending the infant. Moreover, the family can also confide in Hiromu's childhood friend and coworker Tomohiro "Matsu" Matsuo.

Although everything is going well for the young couple and their child, a sudden presence from the past might pose a problem for the peaceful life they dream of.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Holidays!
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Holidays! by Tsunomaki Watame.

data.title: Waluolan Xiao Zhen
data.synopsis:
Valoran Town is a official League of Legends: Wild Rift animation published by Riot Games China. It tells the story of a rich girl, Lux, who moves to Valoran Town to start an independent life to escape the control of her brother Garen. This is the hilarious daily story of the stubborn and troublesome Jinx, the malevolent and cute Veigar, and the narcissistic and romantic Ezreal becoming roommates.

(Source: Papuchochoł)

data.title: Quan Zhi Ming
data.synopsis:
High school student Longjing is transported to the Ming Clan Continent and taken in by Moli, a girl from the Ming Clan. He discovers he's become the only magician there?! Qi Hong, the young lady betrothed to Moli, Puer, the mischievous eldest son of the Hei family, and Wu Yiyan, the continent's strongest martial artist… all join the adventurer's team one after another. Embark on an adventure, young man! A chaotic and hilarious new world begins! …Wait, why has Moli turned evil?!

(Source: Bangumi, translated)

data.title: Wangzhe Da Shixiong
data.synopsis:
After arriving on the Xuanlong Continent, Jiang Beiran experienced the harsh realities of human relationships and gradually figured out the rules of survival in this world. He was later accepted into the Guixin Sect. Within the sect, he appeared to be a low-key disciple devoted to Go, but in reality, he was proficient in all the arts—music, chess, calligraphy, and painting—and skilled in both literature and martial arts. Secretly, he helped the sect discover and cultivate a group of outstanding disciples, embarking on his quiet path to becoming a powerful figure in the world of cultivation…

(Source: Tencent, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Bai Fen Zhi Qi's (百分之七) web novel, Wo Jiushi Bu An Taolu Chu Pai (我就是不按套路出牌).

titles.title: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War Arc Part 3
BLEACH 千年血戦篇-相剋譚-
Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Conflict

data.title: Bleach: Sennen Kessen-hen - Soukoku-tan
data.title_english: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War - The Conflict
data.title_japanese: BLEACH 千年血戦篇-相剋譚-
title_synonyms: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War Arc Part 3
data.synopsis:
After an awe-inspiring battle with Ichibei Hyousube—leader of the Soul Society's Royal Guard—the powerful Yhwach moves into the final stage of his master plan. He aims to slay the Soul King, the being whose very existence maintains the status quo of three worlds: Hueco Mundo, the Soul Society, and the realm of humans that Ichigo Kurosaki and his closest friends hail from. Conquering his own bout with the remainder of the Royal Guard, Uryuu Ishida joins Yhwach in his efforts to create a new world in his image.

With a flood of resolution and newfound power, Ichigo rushes to stop Yhwach from accomplishing his ultimate goal and save the countless lives within the three existing realms. But Ichigo has a complicated lineage, one that leaves him susceptible to Yhwach's sinister influence.

Meanwhile, in a final desperate gambit, Jirou Sakuranosuke Shunsui Kyouraku, the newly promoted head captain of the Soul Society's combat corps, enlists the help of an old enemy whose immense power may turn the tide of battle.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Meitantei Conan Movie 27: 100-man Dollar no Michishirube
Meitantei Conan: Hyakuman Doru no Michishirube
名探偵コナン 100万ドルの五稜星
Detective Conan Movie 27: The Million-Dollar Pentagram

data.title: Meitantei Conan Movie 27: 100-man Dollar no Michishirube
data.title_english: Detective Conan Movie 27: The Million-Dollar Pentagram
data.title_japanese: 名探偵コナン 100万ドルの五稜星
title_synonyms: Meitantei Conan: Hyakuman Doru no Michishirube
data.synopsis:
A message has arrived from Kid the Phantom Thief, that he will steal a Japanese sword belonging to the wealthy Onoe Family in Hakodate, Hokkaido. Conan and Heiji Hattori, who happened to be in Hakodate, are on the case to capture Kid. Onoe Family's collections are associated with Toshizo Hijikata, a historic figure who perished in Hakodate. Why is Kid, who specializes in jewels, going after a Japanese sword?

Coincidentally the family lawyer of Onoe is found murdered in the warehouse district, apparently slaughtered by a Japanese sword. The suspect is an investor/arms dealer who is said to be after Onoe family's hidden treasure.

The grandfather of Onoe family's patriarch was deeply involved with the army industry during wartime, and it was rumored he hid some powerful weapon that could "change the course of war" somewhere in Hakodate. Is Kid after that weapon? Meanwhile, Heiji is trying to find a perfect viewpoint to declare his love to Kazuha...

In the North among cherry blossoms, the exciting hunt for treasure begins!

titles.title: Shaonian Ge Xing: Haiwai Xianshan Pian
少年歌行 海外仙山篇

data.title: Shaonian Ge Xing: Haiwai Xianshan Pian
data.title_japanese: 少年歌行 海外仙山篇
data.synopsis:
When facing adversities, it is essential to maintain a peaceful mindset and remain optimistic. The head of the Lei family tragically passed away after the battle at Lei Family Castle, the Sword Deity thus perished. In an attempt to force himself to use his internal energy, Xiao Se pushed himself to the brink of death. The group embarked on a journey to the mysterious Immortal Mountain overseas to find the legendary deity so that they could save Xiao Se. At the same time, the power struggle between the imperial court and the martial arts world was still going on.

(Source: Youku)
